failure.message: One or more child tests had errors

test-case.name: SandboxScene_FullMatch_AiVsAi_Terminates

failure.message: Unhandled log message: '[Error] RenderTexture.Create failed'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect TearDown : Unhandled log message: '[Error] RenderTexture.Create failed'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true There are no audio listeners in the scene. Please ensure there is always one audio listener in the scene There are no audio listeners in the scene. Please ensure there is always one audio listener in the scene RenderTexture.Create failed RenderTexture.Create failed Failed to set the active render target, ensure that it is a valid render target. RenderTexture.Create failed RenderTexture.Create failed SetConstantBuffer: The current renderer does not support constant buffers. This call will have no effect. SetConstantBuffer: The current renderer does not support constant buffers. This call will have no effect. test-case.name: WeaponUpgrade_5v5_FavorsUpgradedArmy
test-case.output: [TechBalance] WeaponUpgrade 5v5: Player alive=5, HP=100; Enemy alive=0, HP=0 Saving results to: C:/Users/arcsy/AppData/LocalLow/DefaultCompany/diplomaGame\TestResults.xml
